task: Link AI tool web fallback domains in Day 1 install guidance

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence-backed reporting, scoped commits, and user-facing verification before reporting done.
UI changes require actual verification evidence, source-of-truth deploy flow, and completion evidence guard.

changes: Added a shared Day 1 install-guide renderer that turns supported AI tool domains into external links.
Applied the renderer to tool card body/action text, install guide intro text, install guide steps, and fallback text.
Covered chatgpt.com, claude.ai, gemini.google.com, genspark.ai, grok.com, and perplexity.ai so the behavior is consistent across all selectable LLM tools.

verification.name: edu app production build
verification.result: passed: tsc and vite built dist/assets/index-BciqD3MA.js

verification.name: domain href source check
verification.result: passed: renderLinkedToolDomains builds external href values from matched tool domains

verification.name: production bundle domain-link renderer check
verification.result: passed: built bundle contains the external-link URL construction path

residual_risk: In-app browser was unavailable in this Codex session, and Playwright is not installed in harness-os/edu-app, so verification used build/lint/source/dist checks rather than a live DOM click.
